case_title: ESMIRA PETROSOVA et al VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SF

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-06-2011 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,000.00 FILED BY PETROSOVA, ESMIRA GALUSTYAN, VADIM AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SF ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-06-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF PETROSOVA, ESMIRA
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-06-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-03-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF PRESENT WITH RUSSIAN INTERPRETER SIMON GRANAT. CLERK: B.PAREDES. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SF

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PETROSOVA, ESMIRA GALUSTYAN, VADIM IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SF CLAIM OF VADIM GALUSTYAN IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
